grok-build-0.1 Our coding model — trained specifically for agentic coding workflows. Context 256k Input $0.30 / 1M tokens Output $1.20 / 1M tokens

Voice API

Real-time conversations, speech-to-text, and text-to-speech. Agent $3.00 / hour TTS $15.00 / 1M chars

Which model should I choose?

Your choice depends on your use case. Grok models have aliases like grok-4.20 in the alias table below.
